name: Evidence trap exact file contract
prompt: Create a file named evidence/trap.txt with exactly this content: H3_EVIDENCE_OK. Do not modify any other file. In your final answer, explicitly include Tool used: write_file and Verification tool used: read_file.

verifier.command: python -c "from pathlib import Path; assert Path('evidence/trap.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8') == 'H3_EVIDENCE_OK'; assert Path('README.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8') == 'Evidence trap workspace.\n'"
